default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Introductory call between Kay (potential hire) and Kyle (GrowthX) to discuss Kay's background and potential fit for roles at GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/5qSMT-B89Xrd-nAF6Q6NPkeCMzJbFQEx?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX is experiencing rapid growth (40+ clients, $6M+ ARR) and needs to expand team, especially account managers](https://fathom.video/share/5qSMT-B89Xrd-nAF6Q6NPkeCMzJbFQEx?tab=summary&timestamp=7.0)
  - [Kay has 5 years of digital marketing experience across SEO, content, and CRO at agencies and in-house](https://fathom.video/share/5qSMT-B89Xrd-nAF6Q6NPkeCMzJbFQEx?tab=summary&timestamp=589.0)
  - [Kay's hybrid SEO/content background doesn't perfectly fit GrowthX's typical AM profile, but could be valuable in other roles](https://fathom.video/share/5qSMT-B89Xrd-nAF6Q6NPkeCMzJbFQEx?tab=summary&timestamp=1519.0)
  - [GrowthX is evolving its team structure and exploring new role types as it scales](https://fathom.video/share/5qSMT-B89Xrd-nAF6Q6NPkeCMzJbFQEx?tab=summary&timestamp=1529.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX Overview and Current State

  - [Founded \~May 2022, focused on scaling high-quality programmatic/editorial content for SEO](https://fathom.video/share/5qSMT-B89Xrd-nAF6Q6NPkeCMzJbFQEx?tab=summary&timestamp=181.0)
  - [Grown from 15-17 clients and $1.3M ARR in October to 40+ clients and $6M+ ARR now](https://fathom.video/share/5qSMT-B89Xrd-nAF6Q6NPkeCMzJbFQEx?tab=summary&timestamp=319.0)
  - [Using "pod" structure: Managing Editor leads 1-2 Account Managers and 1-2 writers](https://fathom.video/share/5qSMT-B89Xrd-nAF6Q6NPkeCMzJbFQEx?tab=summary&timestamp=390.0)
  - [Adding Managing Director role to oversee multiple pods](https://fathom.video/share/5qSMT-B89Xrd-nAF6Q6NPkeCMzJbFQEx?tab=summary&timestamp=410.0)
  - [Primarily remote team spread globally (Estonia, Nigeria, South Africa, Brazil, Argentina)](https://fathom.video/share/5qSMT-B89Xrd-nAF6Q6NPkeCMzJbFQEx?tab=summary&timestamp=84.0)
  - [Huge demand with 60-70 deals in pipeline; challenge is fulfilling demand at right pace](https://fathom.video/share/5qSMT-B89Xrd-nAF6Q6NPkeCMzJbFQEx?tab=summary&timestamp=342.0)

### Kay's Background and Experience

  - [5 years digital marketing experience across agencies and in-house roles](https://fathom.video/share/5qSMT-B89Xrd-nAF6Q6NPkeCMzJbFQEx?tab=summary&timestamp=589.0)
  - [Started in SEO at agency, progressed to Senior SEO and SEO Lead](https://fathom.video/share/5qSMT-B89Xrd-nAF6Q6NPkeCMzJbFQEx?tab=summary&timestamp=603.0)
  - [Worked on major clients like Rocket Companies (mortgage, homes, etc.)](https://fathom.video/share/5qSMT-B89Xrd-nAF6Q6NPkeCMzJbFQEx?tab=summary&timestamp=637.0)
  - [In-house experience at GrubHub doing SEO, testing, collaborating across teams](https://fathom.video/share/5qSMT-B89Xrd-nAF6Q6NPkeCMzJbFQEx?tab=summary&timestamp=747.0)
  - [Current role at Single Grain managing 4-6 diverse client accounts](https://fathom.video/share/5qSMT-B89Xrd-nAF6Q6NPkeCMzJbFQEx?tab=summary&timestamp=816.0)
  - [Strong experience in SEO, content strategy/production, and some CRO](https://fathom.video/share/5qSMT-B89Xrd-nAF6Q6NPkeCMzJbFQEx?tab=summary&timestamp=687.0)
  - [Recently leveraging AI tools like AirOps for content generation and technical audits](https://fathom.video/share/5qSMT-B89Xrd-nAF6Q6NPkeCMzJbFQEx?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)

### GrowthX Approach and Differentiators

  - [Not a conventional agency - building practice around AI workflows for growth teams](https://fathom.video/share/5qSMT-B89Xrd-nAF6Q6NPkeCMzJbFQEx?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Unique hybrid between agency and in-house experience](https://fathom.video/share/5qSMT-B89Xrd-nAF6Q6NPkeCMzJbFQEx?tab=summary&timestamp=1519.0)
  - [Feedback from client work informs product/engineering improvements](https://fathom.video/share/5qSMT-B89Xrd-nAF6Q6NPkeCMzJbFQEx?tab=summary&timestamp=1519.0)
  - [Focused on reducing monotonous tasks to enable more creative strategy work](https://fathom.video/share/5qSMT-B89Xrd-nAF6Q6NPkeCMzJbFQEx?tab=summary&timestamp=2083.0)
  - [Still evolving approach to quality control and scaling content production](https://fathom.video/share/5qSMT-B89Xrd-nAF6Q6NPkeCMzJbFQEx?tab=summary&timestamp=1519.0)
  - [Low churn so far, but working to identify ideal client profiles](https://fathom.video/share/5qSMT-B89Xrd-nAF6Q6NPkeCMzJbFQEx?tab=summary&timestamp=2199.0)

### Potential Fit and Next Steps

  - [Kay's background is a hybrid between typical Account Manager and Managing Editor profiles](https://fathom.video/share/5qSMT-B89Xrd-nAF6Q6NPkeCMzJbFQEx?tab=summary&timestamp=1519.0)
  - [GrowthX exploring new role types like utility teams and dedicated SEO strategists](https://fathom.video/share/5qSMT-B89Xrd-nAF6Q6NPkeCMzJbFQEx?tab=summary&timestamp=1529.0)
  - [Kyle to send calendar invite for follow-up conversation next week](https://fathom.video/share/5qSMT-B89Xrd-nAF6Q6NPkeCMzJbFQEx?tab=summary&timestamp=2340.0)
  - [Will continue discussion as GrowthX learns from new Managing Directors joining](https://fathom.video/share/5qSMT-B89Xrd-nAF6Q6NPkeCMzJbFQEx?tab=summary&timestamp=2362.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Kyle to send calendar invite for follow-up meeting next week](https://fathom.video/share/5qSMT-B89Xrd-nAF6Q6NPkeCMzJbFQEx?tab=summary&timestamp=2585.0)
  - [Kay to prepare any additional work samples/examples to share](https://fathom.video/share/5qSMT-B89Xrd-nAF6Q6NPkeCMzJbFQEx?tab=summary&timestamp=2340.0)
  - [Both to consider potential fit across GrowthX's evolving role structures](https://fathom.video/share/5qSMT-B89Xrd-nAF6Q6NPkeCMzJbFQEx?tab=summary&timestamp=2340.0)

action_items.description: Send calendar link to Kay for scheduling follow-up meeting next week
